title: Admin signs in and reaches the dashboard
description: This verifies an admin can authenticate and land on the overview dashboard with access to the protected app.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the overview dashboard is displayed

title: CTV can generate a QR discount voucher and staff can complete it
description: This verifies the end-to-end voucher flow from CTV generation through staff verification, check-in, and completion.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the login password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Generate a QR discount voucher in the CTV portal
Open the staff discount verification screen
Verify the generated discount voucher
Check in the verified voucher
Complete the voucher flow
Verify the voucher is marked completed
Verify the voucher can no longer be processed as pending

title: Staff can verify check-in and complete a generated discount code
description: A staff user can open a generated voucher through the verify flow, check in the customer, and complete the code without re-resolving the customer.

steps.description: Navigate to /verify-discount?code=GENERATED_CODE
Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Return to the discount verification flow
Select a valid LOB
Enter the customer's phone number
Verify the discount code
Complete the code
Verify the code is marked as used
Verify the staff attribution is displayed

title: Admin can sign in and reach the overview dashboard
description: This verifies an admin can authenticate and land on the main dashboard successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the login password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the user lands on the overview dashboard
Verify the main admin shell is displayed

title: Admin reaches the overview and can sweep core sidebar routes
description: This verifies an admin can sign in, land on the overview, and open each core admin section without blank screens.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to view the overview
Click the link to view customers
Click the link to view the calendar
Click the link to view payment
Click the link to view services
Click the link to view reports
Click the link to view employees
Click the link to view permissions
Click the link to view settings
Click the link to view commission
Click the link to view feedback
Verify the final route renders a usable admin section
Verify no blank screen is shown

title: Logout ends the session and protects the app
description: This verifies signing out clears access and sends the user back to the login screen when they try to use a protected route.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Sign out of the application
Open a protected area of the app
Verify the sign-in screen is displayed

title: Admin can open every guarded shell route from the sidebar
description: This verifies the admin shell route sweep works without blank screens across the main guarded sections.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}

Submit the login form
Click the link to view the customers section

Click the link to view the services section
Click the link to view the reports section
Click the link to view the employees section
Click the link to view the permissions section
Click the link to view the settings section
Click the link to view the commission section
Click the link to view the feedback section
Verify each guarded admin section renders successfully
Verify no blank screen is shown during the route sweep

Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}

Verify the CTV dashboard is displayed
Verify account-specific portal content is displayed

title: Protected pages redirect back after login
description: This verifies a logged-out user who opens a protected page is returned to that page after signing in.

steps.description: Navigate to /customers
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the customers page is displayed

title: CTV portal access is limited to CTV users
description: This verifies a CTV user can sign in to the portal and access the CTV experience instead of the admin shell.

Fill in the login username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the login password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form

Verify the admin shell is not displayed

title: CTV portal blocks admin access
description: A signed-in CTV is prevented from viewing admin routes and is redirected away from the admin shell.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /overview
Verify access to the admin area is blocked
Verify the user is redirected to an allowed portal view

title: Admin can assign and then clear a CTV on a service
description: This verifies a service can earn commission only when a CTV is explicitly selected and that clearing the CTV reverses the pending earnings.
category: Service Catalog and Strict CTV Commission (DEC-20260610-01)

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the login password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to view the services section
Create a disposable ZZ_TESTSPRITE_ service with an explicit CTV selected
Open the created service for editing
Clear the selected CTV from the service
Verify the service no longer shows a pending CTV earning
Verify the commission attribution is removed from the service

title: Admin can open every sidebar section without a blank screen
description: This verifies each core admin sidebar route renders its headed content and stays usable during a route sweep.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the overview section
Open the customers section
Open the calendar section
Open the payment section
Open the services section
Open the reports section
Open the employees section
Open the permissions section
Open the settings section
Open the commission section
Open the feedback section
Verify the final section content is displayed
Verify the page remains usable without a blank main panel

title: CTV users cannot access admin-only routes

Fill in the login password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Attempt to open an admin-only route from the app shell
Verify the user is kept out of the admin area
Verify only the CTV portal remains available

steps.description: Navigate to a public discount landing route
Verify the voucher landing content is displayed
Verify the page does not redirect to the admin overview

title: Cosmetic customer list shows only cosmetic records
description: An authenticated admin can switch to the Cosmetic line of business and view a customer list that contains only cosmetic data.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page
Fill in the credentials for an admin user
Submit the login form
Switch to the Cosmetic line of business
Open the customer list
Verify cosmetic customers are displayed
Verify dental customer records are not mixed into the list

title: Admin can schedule an appointment and see it in calendar views
description: An admin can create a disposable appointment and confirm it appears in the calendar across supported views.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the calendar page
Create an appointment with all required fields filled
Open the day view
Open the week view
Open the month view
Verify the new appointment is visible in the calendar
Verify the appointment appears across the calendar views

title: Admin can create an appointment and see it across calendar views
description: This verifies a disposable appointment can be created and then viewed in day, week, and month calendar modes.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to view the calendar
Create a new appointment for a ZZ_TESTSPRITE_ customer using valid details
Switch to the week view
Switch to the month view
Verify the appointment is visible on the calendar
Verify the appointment appears in more than one calendar view
